summary: In 1952 Byrd established the Three States Natural Gas Company, which he later sold to Delhi-Taylor, using the money to invest in aircraft production, co-founding Temco Aircraft , which in 1961 merged with friend James Ling 's electronics company and aircraft manufacturer Chance Vought Corporation to form Ling-Temco-Vought LTV
key_points: In 1952 Byrd established the Three States Natural Gas Company, which he later sold to Delhi-Taylor, using the money to invest in aircraft production, co-founding Temco Aircraft , which in 1961 merged with friend James Ling 's electronics company and aircraft manufacturer Chance Vought Corporation to form Ling-Temco-Vought LTV
